step.name: DB Schema: Inventory & Referrals
step.action: Add referralCode (String, Unique, Nullable) to User model.

step.name: Backend: Referral System Logic
step.action: Implement ReferralService to generate unique B2B invite links.
Update AuthController.register to link new pros to the franchisee's ProfessionalNetwork.
Prepare DB relations for future split distribution (Platform/Pro/Franchise).

step.name: Backend: Predictive Supply Engine
step.action: Implement SupplyService to calculate usage using PhygitalPrint cross-referencing.

step.name: Backend: 1-Click Supply Order Engine
step.action: Add adminCreateSupplyOrder endpoint to generate pre-filled Orders for franchises.

step.name: UI: Franchise Dashboard Base
step.action: Create src/pages/franchise/Dashboard.tsx using Midnight Luxury cards.

step.name: UI: Inventory & Referral Widgets
step.action: Build progress-based inventory trackers with 'Low Stock' visual alerts.
Implement 'Copy Referral Link' component with toast feedback.

step.name: UAT: End-to-End B2B Flow
step.action: Test inventory depletion -> stock alert trigger.
